note: Probes the authentication settings object, the mixed/exclusive mode, DN allow/exclude rules, the allowuser hook and the login validator service. Recipe (response-graded); no site mutation.

evals.prompt: Which config key on ldap_authentication.settings decides whether both LDAP and local Drupal accounts can log in versus LDAP-only, and what is its default value?
evals.expected_output: The authenticationMode key on ldap_authentication.settings; default 'mixed' allows both LDAP and local accounts (the other value makes login exclusive/LDAP-only).

evals.prompt: In ldap_authentication, which two settings whitelist and blacklist users based on text contained in their DN?
I want a custom Drupal module to deny an LDAP login after examining the user's LDAP entry. Which hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_ldap_authentication_allowuser_results_alter(Entry $ldap_user, string $name, bool &$hook_result) and set $hook_result to FALSE to deny.

evals.prompt: What is the route name and path of the LDAP Authentication settings form on Drupal 11?
Which service validates submitted credentials against LDAP during the standard Drupal login, in the ldap_authentication module?
evals.expected_output: The ldap_authentication.login_validator service (class LoginValidatorLoginForm); LoginValidatorSso handles SSO.

evals.prompt: Which ldap_authentication setting keeps administrator accounts authenticating locally to avoid lockout, and what is its default?
evals.expected_output: The skipAdministrators key (default true) on ldap_authentication.settings lets admin accounts bypass LDAP authentication.
